title: sideritis montana subsp. montana
intro: Sideritis montana subsp. montana, also known as Mountain tea, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. It is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Mountain tea include reduced stress and anxiety, improved respiratory health, and enhanced immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Mountain tea can be consumed as a tea infusion, taken as a tincture, or used in capsule form, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as bronchitis, fever, and digestive issues.
